summary: Recording appears to be mislabeled (12‑30 instead of the praised 12‑28), with no details on audio or performance quality.
review: The reviewer notes that while the 12‑28 show is considered awesome, this tape is actually from the following night, 12‑30. No comments are made about the soundboard source, mix clarity, or musical highlights, leaving the recording’s technical and musical merits unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single brief review with no star rating and minimal detail; sentiment is ambiguous, so rating is conservative.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound quality or mix; reviewer focused solely on the date discrepancy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer mentions the show is from two nights after an acclaimed performance, but provides no assessment of set pacing or song execution.
